overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza and transit station in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through sunlit urban spaces with towering holographic billboards, palm trees, and modern architecture, eventually ascending a yellow escalator to an elevated walkway overlooking city traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with digital billboards and palm planters

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit plaza past large concrete planters with palm trees and colorful digital signage

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter with tall palm trees
large horizontal billboard displaying vibrant abstract colorful graphics
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the plaza
tall building with illuminated 01 signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit urban plaza with large palm tree planters and towering futuristic buildings. The camera moves forward through the open space, passing concrete benches and approaching a shaded area ahead. Colorful digital billboards and an overhead highway structure dominate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded pedestrian walkway with billboard wall and palm tree line

events.description: entering a shaded walkway with significantly reduced sunlight and cooler lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down a shaded path lined with palm trees on the right and a wall of digital billboards on the left

entered.detail: continuous wall of large digital billboards displaying various advertisements
line of tall palm trees in planters forming a green border along the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a shaded walkway flanked by a wall of glowing digital billboards on the left and a row of palm trees on the right. The lighting becomes noticeably cooler and dimmer as the camera moves through this corridor-like space toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit plaza with yellow escalator station and food kiosks

events.description: exiting shaded walkway into open transit plaza with prominent yellow escalator structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a yellow transit station structure with escalators, passing food kiosks and other pedestrians

entered.detail: bright yellow multi-level escalator and stair structure with transit signage
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a woman's face
yellow and black transit station building with graffiti-style murals
small teal and orange food stand with menu displays

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the shaded walkway into a bright open transit plaza dominated by a striking yellow escalator structure. The area features food kiosks, large vertical billboards, and moderate pedestrian activity. The player approaches the escalator while passing colorful transit station architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending escalator to elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: beginning ascent up the yellow escalator stairs
reaching top of escalator with expansive view of city street below

agents.ego_description: walking up the yellow escalator stairs, transitioning from ground level to elevated walkway

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian bridge with yellow railings overlooking the city
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible from the elevated position

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the bright yellow escalator stairs, transitioning from the ground-level plaza to an elevated walkway. Upon reaching the top, the view opens up to reveal a multi-lane highway below with moving traffic, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and large building-mounted billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge over multi-lane highway

events.description: vehicles visible moving along the multi-lane road below the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pedestrian bridge overlooking the city traffic and streets below

notable_agents.action: cars and trucks driving along the multi-lane highway below the bridge

entered.detail: wide multi-lane road with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions
tall glass and steel building facade with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along an elevated pedestrian bridge with yellow railings, overlooking a busy multi-lane highway with moderate traffic. Tall skyscrapers line both sides of the street below, and the camera moves steadily forward along the bridge with the cityscape stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit urban plaza through a shaded corridor and upward to an elevated city overlook. It begins by moving through a bright open space filled with palm tree planters and towering futuristic buildings under the shadow of an overhead highway. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a cooler, dimmer walkway flanked by glowing digital billboards and palm trees before emerging once again into the light of a bustling transit plaza. The movement then transitions from the ground level as the camera ascends a striking yellow escalator, gradually lifting the perspective above the food kiosks and pedestrian activity. Finally, the view opens up onto an elevated pedestrian bridge with yellow railings, overlooking a multi-lane highway of moving traffic framed by a dense canyon of skyscrapers and massive billboards.
